description_long: This is a modern urban laundromat building with a striking geometric black-and-white patterned roof and facade. The front features large glass windows and a central entrance with steps leading up, flanked by concrete and brick elements. One side of the building is solid black, while the opposite side displays a row of industrial washing machines visible through a transparent or open wall. The roof has a repeating triangular pattern and a skylight, adding to the contemporary aesthetic. The structure sits on a rectangular base with a striped walkway extending from the entrance. The overall design is bold and functional, suitable for a city street or neighborhood setting.
description: A modern laundromat building with geometric black-and-white patterns, large front windows, and visible industrial washing machines on one side.
description_view_0: Front view showing large glass windows, central entrance with steps, and geometric patterned roof.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by a solid black wall and the patterned roof extending backward.
description_view_2: Rear view with the geometric roof, a skylight, and a mostly solid black wall with minimal features.
description_view_3: Side view displaying a row of industrial washing machines and the patterned roof, with a striped walkway visible.
attribute_method_of_hanging: not applicable; machines are installed in wall bays
